twitter_thread: 75% of teams waste 400 hours/year on debugging due to poor tooling.
Delta Debugging can cut debugging time from 10 hours to 4 hours per issue.
Secret-tools' classified Discord utilities reduced our team's meeting time by 30%.
Ditch the 'universal' IDE: use a dedicated tool like Vim for coding, not project management.
Our team replaced 5 tools with a single, specialized test-case reducer, saving $12k/year.
A 1-week investment in a custom debugger saved our team 6 months of dev time.
What obscure tool has saved you the most time in your dev workflow? #softwaretools #productivity
